cards.front: What does the universal quantifier (∀) mean?
cards.back: For all, applies to every element in a set or statement

cards.front: What does the existential quantifier (∃) mean?
cards.back: There exists, applies to at least one element in a set or statement

cards.front: What is the difference between ∀ and ∃ in quantifiers?
cards.back: ∀ applies to all elements, while ∃ applies to at least one element

cards.front: What does ∃! (existential quantifier with uniqueness) mean?
cards.back: There exists a unique element that satisfies a condition

cards.front: What is the scope of a quantifier?
cards.back: The range of elements or statements that the quantifier applies to
